subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God that thy distinguished missive hath arrived, bringing joy and gladness. The pen, moved by yearning to make mention of thee, stirreth the realm of utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله دستخط عالی واصل و مسرت حاصل و قلم شوقا لذکرکم متحرک و عالم انشاء
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
